{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Date
! Book
! Author
! Series
! Meeting Notes
|-
| January 26
| data-sort-value="Ghostwriter"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">The Ghostwriter</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=The+Ghostwriter|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/217506549-the-ghostwriter|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Clark, Julie"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Julie Clark</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Julie+Clark|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/17323560.Julie_Clark|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.01.26 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| February 23
| data-sort-value="Impossible Fortune"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">The Impossible Fortune</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=The+Impossible+Fortune|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/222292420-the-impossible-fortune|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Osman, Richard"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Richard Osman</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Richard+Osman|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/6173710.Richard_Osman|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0652066|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Osman|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Thursday Murder Club #5</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Thursday+Murder+Club|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/series/299267-thursday-murder-club|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| [[2026.02.23 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| March 23
| data-sort-value="Proving Ground"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">The Proving Ground</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=The+Proving+Ground|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/228646211-the-proving-ground|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Connelly, Michael"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Michael Connelly</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Michael+Connelly|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/12470.Michael_Connelly|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0175093|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_Connelly|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Mickey Haller #8</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Mickey+Haller|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/series/44303-mickey-haller|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| [[2026.03.23 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| April 27
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Gone Before Goodbye</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Gone+Before+Goodbye|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/219385951-gone-before-goodbye|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Witherspoon, Reese"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Reese Witherspoon</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Reese+Witherspoon|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/692794.Reese_Witherspoon|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0000702|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reese_Witherspoon|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div> <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Harlan Coben</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Harlan+Coben|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/24689.Harlan_Coben|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm1454192|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harlan_Coben|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.04.27 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| May 18
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">My Husband's Wife</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=My+Husband's+Wife|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/231127462-my-husband-s-wife|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Feeney, Alice"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Alice Feeney</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Alice+Feeney|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/15904689.Alice_Feeney|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.05.18 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| June 22
| data-sort-value="Widow"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">The Widow</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=The+Widow|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/229004506-the-widow|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Grisham, John"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">John Grisham</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=John+Grisham|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/721.John_Grisham|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0001300|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Grisham|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.06.22 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| July 27
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Judge Stone</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S980C12403750|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/242445212-judge-stone|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Davis, Viola"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Viola Davis</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Viola+Davis|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/3262562.Viola_Davis|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0205626|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Viola_Davis|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div> <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">James Patterson</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=James+Patterson|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads_2.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/search?q=James+Patterson|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0666248|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Patterson|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.07.27 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| August 24
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Last One Out</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S114C1832055|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/231387279-last-one-out|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Harper, Jane"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Jane Harper</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Jane+Harper|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/556546.Jane_Harper|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm7681091|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jane_Harper|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.08.24 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| September 28
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">We Are All Guilty Here</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S114C1815381|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/221544394-we-are-all-guilty-here|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Slaughter, Karin"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Karin Slaughter</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Karin+Slaughter|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads_2.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/search?q=Karin+Slaughter|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm4901740|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karin_Slaughter|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">North Falls #1</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=North+Falls|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/series/415983-north-falls|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karin_Slaughter#North_Falls_series_(2025_to_present)|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| [[2026.09.28 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| October 26
| data-sort-value="Unknown"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">The Unknown</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S114C1836243|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/243596193-the-unknown|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Sager, Riley"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Riley Sager</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Riley+Sager|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/15263414.Riley_Sager|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Riley_Sager|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| 
| [[2026.10.26 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| November 16
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">We Chase Shadows</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S114C1838056|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/248986323-we-chase-shadows|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Osman, Richard"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Richard Osman</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Richard+Osman|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/6173710.Richard_Osman|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0652066|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Richard_Osman|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">We Solve Murders #2</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=We+Solve+Murders|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/series/400755-we-solve-murders|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| [[2026.11.16 Meeting Notes]]
|-
| December 18
| data-sort-value="Killer Christmas"|  <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">A Killer Christmas</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/item/show/S114C1791283|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/205062810-a-killer-christmas|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| data-sort-value="Fletcher, Jessica"| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Jessica Fletcher</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Jessica+Fletcher|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/46714.Jessica_Fletcher|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jessica_Fletcher|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div> <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Terrie Farley Moran</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Terrie+Farley+Moran|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/3452048.Terrie_Farley_Moran|Goodreads]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| <div style="display: table; width:100%;"><div style="display: table-row;"><div style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: middle;">Murder, She Wrote #59</div><div style="display: table-cell; float: right;"><div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end;"><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:DouglasCountyLibraries_2.png|20px|link=https://dcl.bibliocommons.com/v2/search?searchType=smart&query=Murder,+She+Wrote|Douglas County Libraries]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Goodreads.png|20px|link=https://www.goodreads.com/series/50842-murder-she-wrote|Goodreads]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:IMDb.png|20px|link=https://www.imdb.com/tt0086765|Internet Movie Database]]</div><div style="display: table-cell;">[[Image:Wikipedia.png|20px|link=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Murder,_She_Wrote|Wikipedia]]</div></div></div></div></div>
| [[2026.12.18 Meeting Notes]]
|}

{| style="width: 100%;"
| style="text-align: left;" | [[Case Files 2025 | &larr; Case Files 2025]]
| style="text-align: right;" | [[Case Files 2027 | Case Files 2027 &rarr;]]
|}
